source.title: Champions Reel: How Barbora Krejcikova won Athens 2026

description: No. 3 seed Barbora Krejcikova captured her ninth career WTA Tour Driven by Mercedes-Benz title, fourth on outdoor hard courts and first since Wimbledon 2024 at the inaugural 2026 edition of the Vanda Pharmaceuticals Athens Open. It was the first time a WTA tournament had been held in Athens since 1990. Runner-up Maria Sakkari followed in the footsteps of her mother, Angeliki Kanellopoulou, the 1986 finalist.
